title: A Little Secret
content: I know that you always take exactly three sips of water before you go to sleep, every single night.

title: The Detail I Love
content: The way your eyes light up when you talk about something you're passionate about, like it's the only thing in the world that matters.

title: The First Moment
content: I still remember the first time I saw you. You were wearing that blue scarf, and I knew right then my life was about to change.

title: Your Inner Strength
content: I see how hard you work even when you're tired, and it inspires me to be a better person every day.

title: Just So You Know
content: I'm obsessed with the way you care about people. It's the most beautiful thing about you.
